subcodes.first_line: Thy letter was illumined by the lights of the Divine Throne and blessed with the glances of the Lord of Names. That which is beloved in this Day is steadfastness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت بانوار عرش منور و بلحاظ مالک اسماء فائز و مشرف امریکه الیوم محبوبست استقامت
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Manifestation of God as divine physician, @outward and inward meanings, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @Greatest Name, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
